title: Saturn Enters the Incident
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9 as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: If this is the best he's got...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It shouldn't fall to the captain to handle him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I suppose the head of an emperor's no. 2 is still a decent consolation prize.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm gonna take a dip in the ocean...

summary: This part advances the Egghead Siege Begins through 10 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
